title: Pulling Wardrobe for HSN
excerpt: Anytime I need something to wear for television ( HSN this time, TBS last time), I seem to call on my favorite person in fashion, Randa. After having her own line for many years that sold to Anthropologie and hundreds…
body:
Anytime I need something to wear for television (HSN this time, TBS last time), I seem to call on my favorite person in fashion, Randa. After having her own line for many years that sold to Anthropologie and hundreds of other retailers, she now works at Trend Chasers. It's headquartered in downtown LA as part of XCVI. It's an awesome company where dozens of brands are based and it's quite fun to do my shopping with them. I was surprised to see Charlotte Tarantola there because her old studio used to be down the street in Culver City. As soon as I saw this wall, I knew what I wanted to wear.

Jack also got to make the rounds and make everyone smile.

Thanks Randa and Charlotte! Here's the look pulled together with an American Apparel tank top, Robin's Jeans. and a necklace I picked up a couple days before the shoot from Strands of Sunshine in St. Petersburg. You can look for the sweater (exclusively at Nordstrom) this fall!
